commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Behold, I have received commandment to bless: and he has blessed; and I cannot reverse it. To bless, not by my own intention, or by that of Balac, but by God, who hath only suffered me to proceed on my journey, on condition that I would declare his will, chap. (Haydock) Hebrew, "Behold, I have received an order to bless "or, with the Septuagint, "I have been chosen to pronounce a blessing; I will bless, and will not revoke it, or leave off.
